text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hi there, I'm Agnes Tachyon. Now, my little
guinea pig, I wonder how your vitals are doing
today?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... quite acceptable, as expected. It's a shame you're not an Umamusume, but nonetheless, you are an excellent test subject for my body modification experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let me offer you some tea as thanks for your
cooperation. Don't be shy now. Drink every last
drop and record any and everything that happens
in a thorough report.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
